DTEval 0.0.10
  • Reference
  • Changelog

    dt.york

    dt.york.Rd

    Nitrogen dioxide (NO2) diffusion tube data for monitoring locations about York, 2005 to 2023.

    dt.york

    Format

    A (63408x15) 'data.frame' object

    X.OS

    Site Easting

    Y.OS

    Site Northing

    SiteId

    Site Identifier

    SiteName

    Site Name

    CalendarYear

    Year tube was deployed/measurement taken

    month

    Month tube was deployed/measurement taken

    measurement.ppb

    Tube measurement (in ppb)

    SiteType

    Site classification

    InAQMA

    Site within the Air Quality Management Area (AQMA)?

    Distance.to.Kerb.of.Nearest.Road..m.

    Distance to kerb of nearest road (m)

    measurement

    Tube measurement (in ug/m3)

    .longitude

    DTEval Tag

    .latitude

    DTEval Tag

    .start_date

    DTEval Tag

    .end_date

    DTEval Tag

    .site_id

    DTEval Tag

    Source

    City of York Council / York Open Data

    https://data.yorkopendata.org/dataset/diffusion-tubes-data (downloaded 2024-12-02)

    Details

    NO2 DT measurement and meta data sets were downloaded from York Open Data (see Source), and processed as follows:

    Measurement data was wide-to-long converted by month and merged with the meta data.

    Monthly measurements, described as "raw data (not bias-corrected) and presented in ppb (parts per billion)", were converted to ug/m3 using:

    (Defra; EU method; 20oC and 1013mb)

    https://uk-air.defra.gov.uk/reports/cat06/0502160851_Conversion_Factors_Between_ppb_and.pdf

    measurement.ppb * 1.9125

    WGS84 Latitude and Longitude coordinate tags were calculated for the data using grey.area::geoConvertBNG2LatLon and assuming X.OS and Y.OS are British National Grid (BNG) Easting and Northing coordinates, respectively.

    Note

    This data set is from a public source but still being QA'ed/cleared. So, contents may change. So, handle with care, and report any concerns.

    Contents

    Developed by Karl Ropkins.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
